evidence: FGAP-077 schema-write dual-surface unit — commit 7ad8fbd. Shipped: schema-write.ts writeSchemaChecked (presence guard + draft-07 meta-validation via writeSchema; dryRun = same validator, no write) + Pi tool write-schema + scripts/orchestrator/write-schema.ts + schema-write-tool.test.ts (8 cases). Completes Cluster A write-twins (edge/config/schema). Verified DEC-0018: build/check/test green (pi-context 524 [+8] / 151 / 157 / 829, 0 fail). Runtime demo: library (create/collision/replace/replace-missing/dry-run-inert/meta-reject all correct) + CLI (dry-run inert / real json / collision exit-5 / missing-schema exit-2 / uninitialized exit-1). Bug found+fixed during verification: the CLI's BootstrapNotFoundError catch used instanceof, which returns FALSE because writeSchemaChecked throws the error transitively via schema-write's own project-dir module instance (a different class object than the CLI's direct project-dir import under tsx/symlink) — uninitialized-cwd wrongly hit exit 5; fixed with a module-instance-proof err.name check. Siblings read-schema/read-config verified correct (direct throw → instanceof works), left unchanged. Migration boundary proven by test 8 (replace-with-version-bump WRITES then validateBlockWithMigration THROWS on old-version item; code MigrationFn closes it). Adversarial: writeSchema is the SOLE schema-file writer (no parallel path). Registration via SKILL.md. Discovered pre-existing flags filed as FGAP-078/079/080.
